name: jda-oil-bangladesh
strengths: 2. **"Original Japanese" positioning** — powerful trust signal in a market flooded with counterfeit oil
3. **"Drive Smarter; Drive Longer"** — clear brand promise
weaknesses: 1. **Single-brand dependency** — JDA only, no product diversity
2. **No car care products** — no detailing, no accessories
5. **Low review count** — only 4 reviews despite 64K followers
threat_level: **Overlap with our idea:** 5/10 (overlaps on oil products only)
